ddls:
CREATE TABLE "eeg_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each EEG channel */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the EEG channel */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., EEG, EMG) */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement used for the channel */,
  "sampling_reference" INTEGER /* Sampling rate in Hz */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference setup for the channel */,
  "impedance" REAL /* Impedance of the channel */,
  "noise_level" REAL /* Noise level of the channel */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of last calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name or title of the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject involved in the experiment */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protocol used in the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experiment */,
  "study_design" TEXT /* Design of the study (e.g., within-subjects, between-subjects) */,
  "recording_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used during recording (e.g., sampling rate, resolution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_protocol_id FOREIGN KEY ("protocol_id") REFERENCES protocols ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Full name of the subject */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the subject */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history relevant to the study */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the subject */,
  "consent_form" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the subject has signed the consent form */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the EEG data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format of the EEG data (e.g., CSV, EEG) */,
  "sampling_rate" INTEGER /* Sampling rate of the recorded data */,
  "resolution" INTEGER /* Resolution of the recorded data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, technician, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the EEG data file accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the file */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the protocol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the protocol */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the protocol was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the protocol was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the event is tied to */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., stimulus, response) */,
  "event_time" REAL /* Time of the event in seconds relative to the experiment start */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus used (e.g., visual, auditory) */,
  "stimulus_duration" REAL /* Duration of the stimulus in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_processing" (
  "processing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing method applied */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the processing is associated with */,
  "method" TEXT /* Type of processing method used (e.g., filtering, FFT) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used during processing */,
  "result_file" TEXT /* File path to the results of the processing */,
  "processing_date" TEXT /* Date the processing was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("processing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_processing_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the feedback is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments and observations by the user */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "stimulus_name" TEXT /* Name of the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus (e.g., visual, auditory) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_file" TEXT /* File path to the stimulus file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_stimuli" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stimulus */,
  "presentation_order" INTEGER /* Order of presentation of the stimulus in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_channels" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the EEG channel */,
  "channel_label" TEXT /* Label of the EEG channel in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "channel_id")
)
